description: KMP (Kotlin Multiplatform) starter: Compose Multiplatform UI, Android/iOS/JVM targets, Koin DI, Decompose navigation.
generate_readme:
# {{project_name}}

> Scaffolded from [kmp-starter-project](https://github.com/mahdirzv/kmp-starter-project). See [`AGENTS.md`](./AGENTS.md) for architecture and module wiring.

## Targets

- **Desktop (JVM)**: `./gradlew --no-daemon :composeApp:run`
- **Android**: `./gradlew --no-daemon :composeApp:assembleDebug`
- **iOS**: open `iosApp/` in Xcode

## Project identifiers

| | Value |
|---|---|
| Root name | `{{project_root_name}}` |
| Package | `{{package_name}}` |
| Bundle ID | `{{bundle_id}}` |

## Learn more

- [`AGENTS.md`](./AGENTS.md) — architecture, DI modules, pack wiring.
- Starter source: https://github.com/mahdirzv/kmp-starter-project

heading: ⚠ Heads up: the following KMP packs are shipped as REFERENCE modules,
not wired dependencies. composeApp/shared do not import from them yet.
To use them, follow the wiring steps in the project's AGENTS.md:
footer: Or remove them with --no-auth --no-theme (and skip --room) if unneeded.
